workingLanguage.description: Language used for prompts to the user and copy in generated prototypes.

outputDir.description: Where mockup folders are written, relative to project root.

defaultTemplate.description: Which built-in template to use when /feature-mockup:make does not specify one.

autoPreview.description: Whether /feature-mockup:make should suggest /feature-mockup:preview at the end.

deployHistory.description: Append-only log of /feature-mockup:deploy invocations. Capped at 20 most recent entries.

framework.description: Prototype framework at deploy time (static-html, next, astro, etc.)

providerMeta.description: Provider-specific fields: draftSiteId (netlify-drop), subdomain (surge), projectName (cloudflare-pages), repository (github-pages), expiresAt (netlify-drop only).
